message:
refactor: move FuncMaps from module_functions.zig to individual modules

Move 326 FuncMap definitions from centralized dispatch file to their
respective module files. Each module now exports `pub const Funcs`.

Benefits:
- module_functions.zig: 7071 → 1083 lines (85% reduction)
- Function maps co-located with handlers (better for AI understanding)
- Each module is self-contained

Pattern applied to all *_mod.zig files:
```zig
const ModuleHandler = *const fn (*NativeCodegen, []ast.Node) CodegenError!void;
pub const Funcs = std.StaticStringMap(ModuleHandler).initComptime(.{...});
```
